rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks for implementation-level contracts must be placed in implementation scopes, not component type scopes.
Implementation contracts should only use assign for existing output features or declared auxiliary variables.
generic_rules: Component type contracts must not reference implementation-only subcomponent paths; use visible inputs and outputs only.
Guarantee statements in implementation scope should not be used; they belong in component type scope.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: In AGREE annexes, ensure left-hand side of assign statements reference valid output features or auxiliary variables.
AGREE contracts in component types should express deterministic dependencies between visible inputs and outputs.
anti_patterns: Avoid placing implementation-specific bindings or subcomponent port references in component type annexes.
Do not include guarantee statements in implementation-level AGREE annex blocks.
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names as AGREE variables
